name: SEMrush
highlight_text: Best Suited For: Freelancers, Large Enterprises, Mid Size Business, Non Profit, Small Business
description:
What SEMrush Does?

SEMrush's local SEO management tool offers robust local rank tracking features that provide businesses with critical insights into their visibility in localized search results and on Google Maps. This tool's intuitive reporting helps businesses easily pinpoint areas of strength and identify opportunities for improvement within specific geographic regions. 

‍

Source: SEMrush

‍

Features

➡️ Track up to 5 keywords in Google's Local Finder results.

➡️ Use the map rank tracker to see local rankings directly on a map.

➡️ Monitor local competitors' map rankings side-by-side.

Benefits

⭐️ Monitor performance across specific zip codes to understand localized search visibility.

⭐️ Analyze performance in targeted areas.

⭐️ Gain detailed insights into your competitive standing in specific searches.

Pros:

✅ A very comprehensive tool, has everything one would need for Local SEO and more

Cons:

❌ Might get too overwhelming at times and takes a while to get used to

‍

Priced at $129 Per Month
